title: LEGO Star Wars: The Clone Wars Darth Maul Mech Building Toy for Boys, Girls, Fans and Fantasy Lovers Aged 6 Years Old Plus, Gift Idea for Kids, Includes a Large Double-Bladed Red Lightsaber 75411
features: Darth Maul Mech building toy for boys, girls and fans aged 6 plus – Inspire kids’ imaginations with this quick-build LEGO Star Wars Darth Maul Mech for action-packed play and display
Darth Maul LEGO Star Wars minifigure – The LEGO minifigure of this iconic Star Wars character comes with a double-bladed red Lightsaber that can be clipped to the back of the mech
Buildable LEGO mech suit – The mech has posable hands, arms, legs and feet, an opening LEGO minifigure cockpit, plus a large double-bladed red Lightsaber
Hours of pretend play – This fantasy building set also includes a LEGO Star Wars Probe Droid that attaches to the back of the mech
Anytime LEGO Star Wars gift for kids aged 6 years old and over – This fun LEGO brick-built mech toy makes a cool gift for boys, girls and any young Star Wars fans and fantasy lovers
LEGO Star Wars collectible mechs – This buildable mech toy is part of a collection of LEGO Star Wars mechs, sold separately
Explore the full range – LEGO Star Wars sets (sold separately) enable kids and adult Star Wars fans to relive iconic scenes, create new stories or simply display the buildable models
Built for action and display – The Darth Maul Mech building toy in this 143-piece set stands over 12 cm (5 in.) tall and can be displayed between playtime missions
description: From the manufacturer Unleash the power of the Darth Maul Mech Have fun exploring the dark side of the LEGO Star Wars galaxy with this fantasy building toy for kids. Build fast and play for hours This brick-built mech toy is designed for playing out action-packed Star Wars: The Clone Wars battles to take over Mandalore. LEGO Star Wars Darth Maul Mech Cockpit Place the Darth Maul LEGO minifigure in the cockpit. Action poses Pose the mech’s arms, legs and feet. Huge, mech-sized Lightsaber Grip the double-bladed red Lightsaber in the mech’s hands. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Anytime treat for young kids This unique LEGO Star Wars building toy is a cool surprise gift idea for boys, girls and any fans aged 6 years old and over.
